general_notes: Feature that excludes departing primary residence PITIA from DTI when buying a new home.
Available through select investors: Cronus Jumbo, Onyx Expanded Prime Plus, Ultimate Aspire, Easy Choice.
Departing home must be listed for sale on MLS (or letter of intent to list within 90 days).
Most investors require 20-30% equity in departing home (exterior appraisal within 6 months).
Additional reserves on departing PITIA: 6-24 months depending on investor and market time.

additional_rules.departing_home_requirement: Must be listed for sale (MLS listing) or letter of intent to list within 90 days
additional_rules.additional_reserves: 6-24 months PITIA on departing home (varies by investor and appraisal market time)
additional_rules.income_docs: Full doc, bank statement, CPA P&L, or WVOE accepted
additional_rules.departing_equity_as_downpayment: Some investors allow using departing home equity as down payment
